title: WorkForms: Redirect URL AFTER closed form or button to capture wait list
excerpt:
Hi Community, 
I use the WorkForms feature as a registration form for educator participants to sign up for my NGOs workshops. We love the feature that we can limit the amount of submission so this works for us to set spa…

posts.author: Colbita24 (Colby Vargas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Community,

I use the WorkForms feature as a registration form for educator participants to sign up for my NGOs workshops. We love the feature that we can limit the amount of submission so this works for us to set space limits for enrollment.

It’s cool that you can redirect form fillers to a separate URL after submission but I’m looking for a way to either redirect to a separate URL AFTER the form closes to capture those interested in a waitlist OR for there to be a button for those to be added to a waitlist after the form closes that funnels the information of that person into the same board under a different group so that we can pull from that waitlist once we make confirmation calls.

I haven’t found a way to do this so I’m requesting it as a new possible feature.

posts.author: kevin_vaghasiya (kevin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey, we do event registrations with submission limits too and had the same problem.

FormFlow handles this pretty well. You can set submission limits, and when the limit is hit theres a custom message you control. You can also set up redirect URLs and time window restrictions so the form is only open during a specific registration period.

We use it for our quarterly workshops and it works great. No more people seeing a generic closed message with no next steps.
